careers.description: Joyina iqela lethu kwaye wakhe ikamva lakho

enterpriseSoftware.description: Izicelo zeshishini ezenziwe ngokwezifiso kunye nezikhokelo zangoku

aiMl.title: I-AI, i-ML kunye ne-Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Gqibezela imibhobho ye-AI / ML kunye needeshibhodi ze-BI

cloudArchitecture.title: Uyilo lwelifu kunye neziseko zophuhliso
cloudArchitecture.description: Izisombululo zelifu elininzi kunye ne-orchestration yesikhongozeli

devops.title: I-DevOps kunye nobunjineli beqonga
devops.description: Imibhobho ye-CI / CD kunye neziseko zophuhliso njengekhowudi

digitalTransformation.title: Inguqu yedijithali kunye nesicwangciso
digitalTransformation.description: Iimephu zendlela zotshintsho lweshishini kunye neengcebiso

featured.title: Iposti yebhlog ebonisiweyo
featured.description: Funda enye yeenkcukacha zethu zamva nje zobunjineli

innovationLabOverview.title: Isishwankathelo seLebhu ye-Innovation
innovationLabOverview.description: Jonga zonke iindawo zophando kunye neendlela zovavanyo

education.title: Izibonelelo zobuchwephesha
education.description: Izikhokelo, iitutorials, kunye neendlela ezilungileyo ezivela kwiqela le-Horizon Tech

support.title: Iziko leNkxaso
support.description: Fumana uncedo kwiinkonzo zethu zophuhliso lwesoftware

footer.description: Ukuqala kophuhliso lwesoftware esekwe eSarajevo, eBosnia. Sakha isoftware yesiko, izisombululo ze-AI / ML, ulwakhiwo lwefu, kunye neenkqubo ezizenzekelayo.

header.description: Ukusuka kuphuhliso lwesoftware yeshishini kunye nobukrelekrele beshishini obuxhotyiswe yi-AI ukuya kwiziseko zelifu kunye nezisombululo ze-IoT-sihambisa ngeenkonzo zetekhnoloji ezibanzi eziqhuba izinto ezintsha kunye nokukhawulezisa ukukhula.

caseStudies.title: Izifundo zakutshanje
caseStudies.description: Isishwankathelo seziphumo zokuhanjiswa kwi-fintech, ukhathalelo lwempilo, ukuhanjiswa, kunye neenkqubo zecandelo likarhulumente.

blog.title: Kutshanje kwibhlog yethu
blog.description: Amanqaku obunjineli asebenzayo avela kwi-AI yakutshanje, iqonga, kunye nomsebenzi wokuhambisa ilifu.

innovationLab.title: ILebhu ye-Innovation
innovationLab.description: Phonononga iiprototypes, iimvavanyo, kunye neeprojekthi ze-R &D ezisetyenzisiweyo ezivela kwiqela lobunjineli be-Horizon Tech.
